FAQ
Below are some frequently asked questions:
 How Can I Get Started?

If you have any issues you can contact us at Contact@vipindicators.com or visit the contact page view contact page <
 What Are VIP Trading Indicators?
VIP Trading Indicators are powerful tools designed to help you find profitable opportunities in the markets, while doing all the complex analysis for you. They look at how market prices move and trends to give you clear signals on when to buy, sell, or set a stop-loss. These tools turn complicated market information into easy-to-understand trading opportunities, so traders at any level can use them with confidence. Whether you're experienced or new to trading, VIP Trading Indicators can guide you to find profitable and accurate trades. You will get instant access to 5+ of the most profitable trading indicators that we have created.
 What Are The 5 VIP Indicators?
The 5 profitable VIP Indicators are:
1) VIP Market Scanner™ < read more
2) Cloud Band Signals™ < read more
3) Market Prediction Indicator™ < read more
4) The Trend Navigator & VIP Oscillator™ < read more 
5) Support & Resistance Matrix™ < read more
 Can A Complete Beginner Use Our VIP Indicators
Yes, 100%! All of our trading indicators are extremely easy and very simple to use. The indicators do all the complexed work for you and simply tell you where to buy, where to take profit and where to place your stop loss.  We also offer new members free help / support with getting set up and creating an account to take your trades with and everything else. Even if you can't read the charts, our simple & powerful VIP Indicators will tell you when to buy and where to take profit, finding you profitable market opportunities 24/Hrs per day

You will also get access to our entire trading course for free which is included with the VIP Indicators. This course will cover everything you need to know to get started with trading & will help you understand the trading market like a professional. 
 Do The VIP Indicators Take Trades On Your Behalf?
No, VIP Indicators tell you when to enter a trade - buy - sell etc... They act as a signal to let you know when there is a good opportunity. They can not take trades for you.
 What Markets Do VIP Indicators Work With?
VIP Indicators work on any market available on TradingView. The Indicators also work on all timeframes including 1m, 5m, 30m, 1H, 4H, 1D, etc.
The Trading indicators that  we provide can work for any style of trading, whether it is short term daily or long term trading, VIP indicators work for all types.
 How Accurate Are The VIP Indicators?
On average, the VIP indicators can make profit up to 93% of the time. This is based on years of backtesting by our team and customers.
 What Do You Get After Purchasing?
You'll receive all the 5 most profitable VIP trading indicators + You'll get to join the private telegram group.
 What Countries Does This Work In?
You can get access to our trading  indicators  from any country anywhere In the world. We accept people from all over the world with no issue.
 How Much Does It Cost?
It only cost $9 per month which you can cancel at anytime.
 Why Buy VIP Indicators?
VIP Indicators are super easy to use and set up. Once you've joined VIP indicators, you can instantly start using the profitable indicators and attach them to your trading charts. The simple setup takes less than a minute! They are extremely powerful tools for traders and scan the markets while giving you clear, easy-to-follow signals on when to buy or sell. They do all the work for you 24/hrs around the clock. They're perfect for trading and can help you make 10x more profits. These indicators keep you updated with the latest market moves so you never miss any profitable opportunities.
